overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating rain-soaked Night City streets at night. The player drives through neon-lit downtown intersections, stops behind a truck, maneuvers around it, and continues through tunnels and underpasses with heavy rain and reflective wet roads throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked downtown intersection with neon signage

events.description: approaching and stopping behind a white Thorton truck at the intersection
comes to a complete stop behind the truck, speed drops to zero

agents.ego_description: driving through wet city streets and stopping behind a white Thorton truck at an intersection

notable_agents.action: white Thorton truck stopped at the intersection ahead, blocking the lane
group of pedestrians crossing the street at the crosswalk

entered.detail: rain-soaked asphalt road with reflective surface and puddles
tall building facade illuminated with pink and red neon lights
large digital advertising screen displaying animated content
zebra crossing markings on the road surface
tall street light pole with overhead illumination

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk downtown intersection at night, with neon-lit buildings lining the streets. The vehicle approaches a crosswalk where pedestrians are crossing, then stops behind a white Thorton truck waiting at the traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with concrete barriers and overpass

events.description: pulls out from behind the truck to pass it on the left side
completes passing maneuver and makes a right turn onto a new street

agents.ego_description: waiting behind the truck, then pulling out to pass it on the left and making a right turn

notable_agents.action: white Thorton truck stopped ahead, then passed on the left and left behind

entered.detail: low concrete road barrier with red reflective strip
concrete overpass bridge crossing above the street
opening to a side street between buildings

segments.scene_description: Waiting behind the stopped truck on a narrow urban street lined with concrete barriers. The driver pulls out to pass the truck on the left, then makes a right turn, passing under a concrete overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown arterial road with billboards and elevated ramps

events.description: accelerates along the multi-lane road, passing industrial buildings
approaches and enters the tunnel underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: cruising through downtown streets at moderate speed, navigating past other vehicles and under overpasses

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle driving ahead in the same lane with taillights visible

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway ramp structure running parallel to the road
large industrial warehouse building with minimal lighting
dark tunnel opening with overhead lighting fixtures at the entrance

segments.scene_description: Cruising along a multi-lane arterial road with elevated highway ramps on the left and industrial buildings. The vehicle passes large digital billboards and approaches a tunnel entrance, transitioning from the open street to the underpass system.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete tunnel underpass with overhead lighting and descending ramp

events.description: enters the enclosed tunnel underpass from the open street, losing sky visibility
descends on the curved ramp within the tunnel system

agents.ego_description: driving through the enclosed tunnel system, descending on a curved ramp with concrete walls

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with illuminated brake lights descending the tunnel ramp

entered.detail: enclosed concrete tunnel with curved walls and ceiling
smooth concrete walls with ventilation grates and emergency fixtures
overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior
yellow and white lane markings with high reflectivity

segments.scene_description: Driving through the enclosed tunnel underpass with concrete walls and overhead artificial lighting. The road descends on a curved ramp with reflective markings, sheltered from the rain, following another vehicle through the dimly lit concrete corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis that transitions from neon-lit downtown intersections into a sheltered concrete underpass. It begins by navigating a wet urban intersection lined with glowing buildings, eventually coming to a halt behind a white Thorton truck at a traffic light. As the vehicle pulls out to pass the truck on the left, the scene shifts through a right turn and under a concrete overpass, moving away from the dense city center. The camera then cruises along a multi-lane arterial road past industrial buildings and large digital billboards before the open street narrows into a tunnel entrance. Finally, the environment transforms into an enclosed underpass where the rain vanishes, replaced by artificial overhead lighting and reflective markings on a descending curved ramp.
